info.name: PH eReferral Connectathon
info.description: Postman collection for the PH eReferral Implementation Guide (v0.1.0) based on the PH eReferral Data Dictionary. All values are parameterized using Postman variables mapped to REF element IDs.

variable.value: Dr. Rafael S. Tumbokon Memorial Hospital
Severe pre-eclampsia requiring IV antihypertensive, seizure prophylaxis, and maternal-fetal monitoring
Severe headache, dizziness, blurring of vision and epigastric pain for 2 days
Chief complaint: severe headache, dizziness, blurring of vision and epigastric pain for 2 days. G2P1, 32 weeks AOG.
Pre-referral treatment given: Methyldopa 250mg BID, Folic Acid 5mg OD, FeSO4 300mg OD, CaCO3 500mg TID.
Proteinuria 3+. Findings consistent with severe pre-eclampsia.
Ana Reyes, 38-year-old G2P1, 32 weeks AOG. BP 180/110 mmHg with severe headache, dizziness, and blurring of vision. Proteinuria 3+. Referred for urgent management of severe pre-eclampsia.
New referral for Ana Reyes with severe pre-eclampsia. Awaiting DRSTMH response.
